title: Peppery Gooey Mexican Ground Cinnamon Stir-fry
description: A spicy and gooey brunch dish that incorporates ground cinnamon into a traditional Mexican recipe, perfect for those looking for a whole30-friendly treat.

ingredients.name: Chicken Breast
ingredients.notes: Thoroughly cooked to an internal temperature of at least 165°F (74°C)

instructions: Heat the avocado oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the ground cinnamon and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Add the garlic cloves, red pepper flakes, chili powder, cumin seeds, and salt. Stir well and cook for an additional minute.
Pour in the water and stir again until all ingredients are well combined.
Place the chicken breasts into the skillet and reduce heat to low. Cover and let simmer gently for about 15 minutes or until chicken is fully cooked through.
Once done, remove the lid and increase the heat to medium. Stir occasionally and cook until the mixture thickens slightly and becomes gooey on top.
